main.description: A proof record that cryptographically or attestationally verifies a claim about a subject resource — e.g. identity, completion, payment, or consent.

type.description: The category of proof being provided.

subject.description: AT-URI of the record this proof attests to (e.g. a purchase or consent).

issuer.description: DID of the entity issuing or signing this proof.

claim.description: Human-readable or structured assertion being proven (e.g. 'payment completed', 'identity verified').

method.description: Cryptographic or verification method used to produce this proof.

value.description: The actual proof payload — e.g. a base64-encoded signature, a hash, or a verifiable credential JWT.

evidence.description: Optional list of supporting evidence URIs or CIDs.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this proof was generated.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry after which this proof should no longer be trusted.
